title: Reenita Malhotra Reimagines Jallianwala Bagh in Vermilion Harvest
description: Reenita Malhotra's latest book, Hora’s Vermilion Harvest: Playtime at the Bagh is a sweeping love story set against the shadow of the Jallianwala Bagh massacre, where memory, identity, and history collide in deeply human ways.
